name: Strawberry Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add buttermilk, baking soda, and melted butter to the eggs.
3. Stir in flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Fold in sliced strawberries.
5. Preheat an electric skillet to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Lightly brush the surface of the skillet with butter.
7. Pour 2 tablespoons batter for each pancake into the skillet.
8. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges are dry, then turn and cook 1 to 2 minutes or until done.
9. Makes 30 - 2 inch pancakes.
